briefdescription.para: Maps GPG stderr (which may include status-fd 2 tokens) to a translated user-friendly encryption error string.

detaileddescription.para: Checks machine-readable [GNUPG:] status tokens first (locale-independent), then falls back to case-insensitive substring matching for GPG builds that do not emit status tokens. Returns an empty string when no known pattern matches.
Declared here so it can be exercised by unit tests without linking the full Pass object.

briefdescription.para: Parses 'pass grep' raw output into (entry, matches) pairs.

detaileddescription.para: Declared here so it can be exercised by unit tests without linking the full Pass object.
pass grep emits ANSI blue color (\x1B[94m) at the start of each entry header line. This is checked before stripping ANSI so headers are detected reliably regardless of locale.
